name: the reveal marker reports how many namespaces were revealed and how many are activated
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>m.err >/dev/null; grep -qE 'full_surface_revealed=[0-9]+ activated=[0-9]+' m.err && echo reveal-marker 1>&2
